\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Paired comparison of adjacently ranked access layers on the deep/nested
    fetch (PostgreSQL), over the 25 repeated runs. Because
    every layer runs the identical per-replicate request stream, layers are compared
    on their per-replicate throughput ratios: median throughput (req/s) with
    bootstrap 95\% CI, the geometric-mean paired ratio A$/$B with a paired bootstrap
    95\% CI, paired dominance (fraction of replicates in which A exceeds B), and the
    two-sided paired sign-flip permutation $p$ (20000 permutations; a value
    of $5.0{\times}10^{-5}$ is the resolution floor $1/(B{+}1)=1/20{,}001$, i.e.
    the observed statistic exceeded every permutation; the Wilcoxon signed-rank
    test agrees, replication package).}
  \label{tab:significance}
  \begin{adjustbox}{max width=\textwidth}
  \begin{tabular}{l r r r r r}
    \toprule
    Comparison (A $>$ B) & med.\ A [95\% CI] & med.\ B [95\% CI] & ratio A$/$B [95\% CI] & dom. & perm.\ $p$ \\
    \midrule
    pg $>$ knex & 3687~[3602--3737] & 2487~[2465--2505] & 1.48~[1.46--1.50] & 1.00 & $5.0{\times}10^{-5}$ \\
    knex $>$ drizzle & 2487~[2465--2505] & 1865~[1837--1875] & 1.33~[1.31--1.35] & 1.00 & $5.0{\times}10^{-5}$ \\
    drizzle $>$ typeorm & 1865~[1837--1878] & 1204~[1188--1223] & 1.54~[1.52--1.56] & 1.00 & $5.0{\times}10^{-5}$ \\
    typeorm $>$ prisma & 1204~[1188--1223] & 1186~[1160--1203] & 1.02~[1.00--1.03] & 0.64 & 0.0230 \\
    prisma $>$ objection & 1186~[1160--1203] & 1028~[1020--1037] & 1.15~[1.13--1.18] & 1.00 & $5.0{\times}10^{-5}$ \\
    objection $>$ sequelize & 1028~[1020--1037] & 991~[977--998] & 1.04~[1.03--1.05] & 0.88 & $5.0{\times}10^{-5}$ \\
    sequelize $>$ mikroorm & 991~[977--998] & 516~[499--525] & 1.93~[1.90--1.97] & 1.00 & $5.0{\times}10^{-5}$ \\
